use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF POST-OPERATIVE INFLAMMATION AND PAIN FOLLOWING OCULAR SURGERY

indications.text:
LOTEMAX® SM (loteprednol etabonate ophthalmic gel) 0.38% is a corticosteroid indicated for the treatment of
post-operative inflammation and pain following ocular surgery.
